title: ALI'S SMP
description: Adventure-based pack with an emphasis on multiplayer play. Includes other mods to help with automation as well!
body:
# Ali's SMP

> **_With revamped terrain, emphasis on adventuring, and multiplayer support in mind, this lightweight, optimized pack is sure to keep you and your friends entertained._**

### Features

- **Tectonic** and **Terralith** add breathtaking scenes
- **Dungeons and Taverns**, **YUNG's Cave Biomes**, and **Hopo Better Mineshaft/Ruined Portals/Underwater Ruins** all help to revitalize the vanilla structures we are more than used to.
- **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**, **Celestisynth**, **Artifacts**, **Better Combat** to help you gear up.
- **Sodium** and family to optimize your game
- **Create** and its addons, as well as **AE2** to keep the base up and running
- Lots of quality of life features/mods and aesthetic changes as well!
